code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut have_token = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
mut stop = false

while i < n and not stop
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if have_token
      let num = sign * value
      if num < 0
        stop = true
      else
        total = total + num
      end
      have_token = false
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
    have_token = true
  else if b == 43
    have_token = true
  else
    value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    have_token = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if have_token and not stop
  let num = sign * value
  if num >= 0
    total = total + num
  end
end

println("partial=#{total}")
